title: toggle_controls command
description: Swap the entity's active control mapping (keys and feedback) to a new set.
markdownDescription: Swap the entity's active *control mapping* (keys and feedback) to a new set.

prefixItems.title: toggle_controls command
prefixItems.description: Swap the entity's active control mapping to a new set.

control_cmds.title: Control Commands
control_cmds.description: Dict mapping action names to lists of commands, replacing the entity's current control_cmds.
control_cmds.markdownDescription: Dict mapping action names to lists of commands, replacing the entity's current `control_cmds`.

key_feedback.title: Key Feedback
key_feedback.description: Dict mapping action names to feedback data, replacing the entity's current key_feedback.
key_feedback.markdownDescription: Dict mapping action names to feedback data, replacing the entity's current `key_feedback`.
